summary: Execution-context and concurrency guidance for reactive pipelines, including scheduler selection, time control, and observer-thread behavior.
recommendedPatterns: Make SubscribeOn and ObserveOn choices explicit when thread or context matters.
Treat timing operators and scheduler choices as one contract.
Use test schedulers to validate scheduler-sensitive behavior.
avoidPatterns: Do not rely on implicit scheduler defaults when thread-affinity matters.
Do not assume production and observation happen on the same context.
setupSteps: Identify where work is produced and where it is observed.
Select the correct scheduler for timers, coordination, and UI or request-thread boundaries.
commonPitfalls: Race conditions caused by hidden scheduler transitions.
UI-thread bugs caused by missing observation context switches.
